title: The Tower Battles Begin
description: Each Straw Hat faces a CP9 opponent while the rescue depends on finding the correct key before Robin reaches the Gate of Justice.
scene: Across pages 6, 7, 8, 9, this part follows Luffy, Fukurou, Zoro, Franky, Nami. Each Straw Hat faces a CP9 opponent while the rescue depends on finding the correct key before Robin reaches the Gate of Justice.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I'm proud of myself with a Don...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: For helping the guy called Roger!!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Also an idiot, just like him...

dialogue.speaker: Sogeking
dialogue.text: ... and you lent him a hand...

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Have done the same, wouldn't you?

dialogue.speaker: Fukurou
dialogue.text: Damn it!! You, come with me!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: crush them in this judicial tower!!!

summary: Each Straw Hat faces a CP9 opponent while the rescue depends on finding the correct key before Robin reaches the Gate of Justice.
